args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

businesses = locals()['var_function-call-13998422049312414098']
reviews = locals()['var_function-call-15986666269994092032']

df_bus = pd.DataFrame(businesses)
df_rev = pd.DataFrame(reviews)

# Convert rating to numeric
df_rev['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_rev['rating'])

# Calculate average rating
avg_ratings = df_rev.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
avg_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'avg_rating'}, inplace=True)

# Merge with business names
merged = pd.merge(df_bus, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id')

# Sort by avg_rating descending
merged_sorted = merged.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False)

# Get top 5
top_5 = merged_sorted.head(5)

# Format the result as a list of names
result = top_5[['name', 'avg_rating']].to_dict(orient='records')

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(result))

args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

businesses = locals()['var_function-call-13998422049312414098']
reviews = locals()['var_function-call-15986666269994092032']

df_bus = pd.DataFrame(businesses)
df_rev = pd.DataFrame(reviews)
df_rev['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_rev['rating'])

avg_ratings = df_rev.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
avg_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'avg_rating'}, inplace=True)

merged = pd.merge(df_bus, avg_ratings, on='gmap_id', how='left') # use left join to see all
merged_sorted = merged.sort_values(by='avg_rating', ascending=False)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(merged_sorted.to_dict(orient='records')))
